docs.title: 🔎 Search Diagnostics
docs.text: This page helps verify whether the Material for MkDocs search engine is functioning correctly on this site.

docs.title: ✅ 1. Check if the search index is reachable
docs.text:
Click the link below:

View search_index.json

Expected results: - If it downloads or opens a large JSON blob → Good - If it shows 404 / Cannot load / HTML error → Search cannot work

docs.title: ✅ 2. Real-time browser diagnostics
docs.text:
Open your browser’s Developer Tools: - Chrome / Edge → F12 → “Network” tab - Refresh the page - In the filter box, type: search

You should see requests for:

  • search_index.json
  • search.js
  • worker/search.worker.js (depending on theme version)

If any are red / 404 / blocked, search will return zero results.

docs.title: ✅ 3. JavaScript console errors
docs.text:
Open DevTools → “Console”.

Common failure messages include: - Failed to fetch search_index.json - Cannot read property 'config' of undefined - Uncaught ReferenceError: lunr is not defined - Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404

If you see any of these, search is broken due to missing/inaccessible JS assets.

docs.title: Script Index
docs.text:
This page is generated at build time. To improve discoverability on a page that contains scripts, add:

  • tags: [script, <more-tags>]
  • > Summary: One sentence describing the script
Script Summary Tags
